version_detect.source: path/plist-key/json-pointer where a version string can be read (metadata-only)

storage_epochs.label: e.g. a version era or storage location

retention_hint: describe any built-in retention setting, or omit
why: One sentence: what this artifact contains and why it matters.
guidance: Actionable, non-destructive suggestion the user can follow.
e.g. keep this out of cloud-synced folders and git repositories.
